metadata.title: Home Renewal | Buy, sell and renovate properties
metadata.description: Buying, selling and renovation under one roof. Property buy-outs, complete renovations and brokerage.

hero.subtitle: HOME RENEWAL
hero.title: Buy, sell and renovate — all in one place
hero.description: We'll buy your property, renovate it or handle the sale. Everything under one roof.

sell.title: I want to sell
sell.description: Property buy-out, renovation with a follow-up sale, or brokerage.

buy.title: I want to buy
buy.description: Current listings, showcases of our work and financing support.

renovate.title: Full renovation
renovate.description: We handle the whole process from A to Z.

step1.title: Consultation
step1.description: Get in touch and we'll discuss what we can do for you.

step2.title: Offer
step2.description: We prepare a price offer and a schedule.

step3.title: Execution
step3.description: We take care of the entire process.

step4.title: Handover
step4.description: We deliver on time and in quality.

empty.title: Listings coming soon
empty.description: We'll publish new properties shortly. Get in touch or subscribe to be the first to know.

newsletter.label: NEWSLETTER
newsletter.title: Subscribe to our newsletter
newsletter.description: We'll let you know about new properties before they hit the public real-estate portals.
newsletter.consent: By submitting you agree with the processing of personal data.

homeContact.label: CONTACT
homeContact.title: Get in touch
homeContact.description: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.description: Buying, selling and renovating properties — all in one place.

hero.label: I WANT TO SELL
hero.title: I want to sell my property
hero.description: Pick the sale option that suits you. We focus mainly on variants A and B, where we take care of everything.

intro.title: Three ways to sell
intro.description: Depending on how fast you need the money and how much you want to handle yourself.

a.name: Variant A
a.subtitle: Property buy-out
a.tagline: Sell the property directly to us.

step1.title: Get in touch
step1.description: Write to us or fill in the form.

step2.title: Offer
step2.description: We'll prepare a non-binding offer within 24 hours.

step3.title: Contract
step3.description: You pick an option and we sign a contract.

step4.title: Execution
step4.description: We take care of everything else for you.

form.title: Get in touch
form.description: Fill in the form and we'll get back to you.

hero.label: I WANT TO BUY
hero.title: I want to buy a property
hero.description: Current listings, showcases of our work and financing support.

step1.title: Property choice
step1.description: Together we'll pick the right one from our offer.

step3.title: Financing
step3.description: We help with a mortgage or loan.

step4.title: Keys handover
step4.description: Once the contract is signed, you get the keys.

financing.label: FINANCING
financing.title: We help with financing
financing.description: We work with mortgage brokers and banks to find suitable conditions for you.

cta.title: Interested in a viewing?
cta.description: Get in touch and we'll arrange a time.

hero.label: FULL RENOVATION
hero.title: Full renovation
hero.description: We handle the whole process from A to Z.

intro.title: From design to keys handover
intro.description: We cover the architectural design, project documentation, craftsmanship and finishing work. You have one contact person for the entire project.

attic.title: Attic conversions
attic.description: Turning attic spaces into living areas.

step2.title: Design and quote
step2.description: We prepare the layout and budget.

step4.title: Handover
step4.description: We hand over with a warranty.

concreteScreeds.label: CONCRETE SCREEDS
concreteScreeds.title: Concrete screeds
concreteScreeds.description: We offer concrete screeds for floors, walls and furniture.

hero.label: CONCRETE SCREEDS
hero.title: Premium concrete screeds
hero.description: Unique surface treatment for modern interiors and exteriors. Seamless, durable and aesthetically timeless.

seamless.title: Seamless surface
seamless.description: No joints, no transitions. Clean minimalist look for your space.

durable.title: High durability
durable.description: Extremely resistant to wear, water and chemicals. Lifespan of decades.

design.title: Design flexibility
design.description: Wide range of colors and textures. Every realization is unique.

maintenance.title: Easy maintenance
maintenance.description: Minimal maintenance requirements. Regular cleaning products are sufficient.

cta.title: Interested in concrete screeds?
cta.description: We'll happily prepare a non-binding quote.

hero.label: ABOUT US
hero.title: About us
hero.description: Buying, selling and renovating properties under one roof.

story.title: Who we are
story.p1: Home Renewal focuses on buying, renovating and selling properties. We also offer brokerage and full custom renovations.
story.p2: We specialize in apartments and family houses in Prague and the surrounding area.

partner.label: GROUP
partner.title: Part of Pazderka Management
partner.description: We are part of the Pazderka Management group.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.description: We'll be happy to answer any questions.

form.name: Full name
form.success: Message sent. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.consent: By submitting the form you agree with the processing of personal data.
